name: memory-engine
description: Captures user prompts and agent responses to Memory Engine for persistent context across sessions. Includes the /use-memory skill for switching engines mid-session.

api_key.title: API key
api_key.description: Memory Engine API key. Create one with `me apikey create` (or have an admin create one with restricted privileges for your agent).

tree_prefix.title: Tree prefix
tree_prefix.description: Ltree path prefix where captured prompts/responses are stored (e.g. `claude_code.sessions`).
